normalized_title: One of BMX's most influential people
published_title_visible: 24. Greg Mathias, Harry Leary was “one of the most influential people” - “racing 50 frickin years”
published_title_evidence_status: transcribed from supplied YouTube Studio screenshot; an ellipsis marks visible UI truncation where present
working_source_title: Fireside BMX Chat w/ Greg Mathias - Harry Leary was one of the most influential people in the sport of BMX.
working_source_description: In Greg Mathias’ opinion, Harry Leary was one of the most influential people in the sport of BMX. He raced for over 50 years. Greg tells a story of how when he and Harry Leary first started training, Harry would go to Greg’s business. Greg’s wife works there too and didn’t know who Harry was so she asked Harry how long he has been doing this - “Oh about 55 years.” - Also, Greg reflects on younger people not knowing who Harry was but eventually we came to the decision that Harry is still relevant and will remain relevant in the sport of BMX.
frame_mapping_basis: chronological order of the 32 supplied published-frame captures, aligned to the Studio register that omits 10 and contains two distinct records numbered 12
transcript_status: No standalone Short transcript was supplied. The timestamp range is a provisional access reference into the supplied parent machine transcript and requires audiovisual verification.
